Initial Assessment

Purchased 17 March 2025 for 2 500 NOK. Bike appears largely original and complete. Frame is Easton Elite triple-butted aluminium in "Rover Nightfire Red" — inspect welds carefully as aluminium cracks rather than dents. High-spec drivetrain — Shimano XTR rear derailleur and Deore XT crankset with XT RapidFire shifters — notable for a stock 1997 build. Fork is a period-correct Marzocchi Z2 Bomber which is fully rebuildable. Brakes are Shimano XT V-brakes (M739) with Avid SD 2.0 levers. Main issues: saddle torn at nose, chain rusty, rear brake cable frayed, tyres need inspection for age-related cracking. General grime and dried lubricant throughout drivetrain.

History
17 Mar 2025Notes
Spec research completed using 1997 Kona catalogue and period owner accounts. Key corrections: (1) Frame is Easton Elite triple-butted aluminium, not chromoly steel — paint colour is Rover Nightfire Red. (2) Fork confirmed as Marzocchi Z2 Bomber specifically. (3) Brakes confirmed as Shimano XT V-brakes M739, not cantilevers. (4) Shifters confirmed as Shimano XT RapidFire SL-M737/739. (5) Brake levers confirmed as Avid SD 2.0. All component registry, specs, and references updated accordingly.
17 Mar 2025Notes
Bike acquired for 2 500 NOK. Initial photo documentation complete (15 images). Identified components: Shimano XTR rear derailleur, Deore XT crankset (M739), XT RapidFire shifters, Shimano XT V-brakes (M739), Avid SD 2.0 levers, Marzocchi Z2 Bomber fork. Frame confirmed as Easton Elite triple-butted aluminium in Rover Nightfire Red — not steel as initially assumed. Main issues noted: torn saddle, rusty chain, frayed rear brake cable, aged tyres.

Useful References
Shimano XTR M950/952 (1997): Top-tier groupset. Rear derailleur uses standard Shimano cable pull. Jockey wheels are 11t. Service: clean, dry lube only.
Deore XT M739 Crankset: Square taper BB interface. 68mm shell. Chainring bolt pattern: 94/58mm BCD. Crank arm: likely 175mm.
Marzocchi Z2 Bomber (1997): Coil spring with elastomer damping. Service oil: 5wt (10–15ml per leg). Seal kits available from aftermarket suppliers. Colour-keyed legs are characteristic of this model year. Check stanchion diameter before ordering seals.
Shimano XT V-brakes M739: Linear pull (V-brake) — requires long-pull brake levers. The Avid SD 2.0 levers are compatible. Pad cartridges are replaceable; check alignment carefully.
Avid SD 2.0 levers: Long-pull compatible with V-brakes. Check adjuster barrel for corrosion. Compatible with standard 1.5mm brake inner cables.
Chain spec: 8-speed chain — Shimano HG40, KMC Z8 or similar all compatible.
